label: Google Account
description: Update the name on your Google Account. This name appears in Gmail, Google Docs, Google Meet, and other Google services.

process.summary: Log in to your Google Account and update your name in the personal info settings. No documentation is required. Your email address does not change.

steps.description: Go to myaccount.google.com and sign in. Navigate to Personal Info.
Click on your name and update your first and last name. Click Save.
steps.note: You can change your name up to three times every 90 days. There is no requirement to use a legal name.

presence_level_content.some_guidance: This takes about two minutes. Your Gmail address does not change — only the display name that appears in emails you send and in Google products.
